text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's really pouring today. I guess I won't be able to
use the track.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So foggy... I can't even see any of the scenery outside...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe Spe and I should make sunshine dolls to
wish for good weather.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka appears to be down in the dumps
since she can't go on her daily jog.
